title: wedelia helianthoides subsp. prieuriana
intro: Wedelia helianthoides subsp. prieuriana, also known as Sow Thistle or Prieur's Wedelia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Wedelia helianthoides subsp. prieuriana include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and acting as a natural remedy for digestive issues and fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
